words.def: writes (books or stories or articles or the like) professionally (for pay)
words.zh: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 創始人

words.def: a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day
words.zh: n. 小時, 鐘頭, 時間, ...點鐘, 課時

words.def: the products of human creativity; works of art collectively
words.zh: n. 藝術, 人文科學, 技術, 巧妙, 詭計, 美術

words.def: used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning
words.zh: a. 熱的, 熱心的, 辣的, 熱情的, 激動的, 猛烈的, 緊迫的

words.def: (baseball) a failure by a batter or runner to reach a base safely in baseball
words.zh: a. 外面的, 熄滅的, 結束的
